User.title: User
User.description: User connection profile storing active and authenticated social network platform API tokens

lastUpdated.description: The ISO timestamp when the user document was last updated

tokens.description: Secure mapping of connected social media channels including accessToken and profile info

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Social media publication post details scheduled or published to various channels

userId.description: The owner user ID who created this post

topic.description: The topic or theme used to draft this post

caption.description: Main descriptive body content to publish to the platform feeds

hashtags.description: Collection of dynamic tags and topics related to the post

status.description: Status of the scheduled worker dispatch process

dispatchedAt.description: The actual time when external social media APIs successfully finished dispatching

Subscription.title: Subscription
Subscription.description: Billing plan state of the client user account

updatedAt.description: The update date of subscription record

users/{userId}.description: Profiles and long-lived OAuth tokens index of verified hub users

posts/{postId}.description: Schedule calendar items and content dispatches

subscriptions/{subId}.description: Subscription records mapping synchronized active users to premium tiers
